Meet the Artist

Passion for Beauty,
Perfected Over Years

Certified Pro
Founder & Lead Artist

Dipa Amit
Bhanushali

"Makeup isn't about covering flaws — it's about revealing the best version of you."

Trained under the legendary Bijal Gada, completing both a 6-Day and 12-Day Masterclass in Makeup & Personal Business Strategy, Dipa brings certified artistry and deep personal care to every client. Based in Ahmedabad, she specialises in bridal, HD, and airbrush makeup that lasts all day.

🎓

Bijal Gada Certified

Masterclass in Professional Makeup · May 2025, Mumbai
